topic: controlled malolactic fermentation and microbial stability

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A wine containing malic acid can undergo malolactic fermentation later if viable lactic acid bacteria remain.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Completing MLF under controlled cellar conditions consumes the available malic acid before stabilization and bottling.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The risk of an unintended malolactic fermentation and associated haze, gas, or flavour change after bottling is reduced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The risk of an unintended malolactic fermentation and associated haze, gas, or flavour change after bottling is reduced.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
